title: illipe malabaricus
intro: Illipe malabaricus, also known as Shorea stipularis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Illipe malabaricus include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Illipe malabaricus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts can also be used in traditional medicine, making it a valuable resource in the field of herbal medicine.
